title: Fix frontend authorization for updateSiteSettings mutation

requirements.summary: Update the frontend to ensure updateSiteSettings mutation always uses the authenticated actor and guards against unauthenticated calls with a clear error message
acceptanceCriteria: The updateSiteSettings mutation uses the authenticated actor (Internet Identity identity attached) when the user is logged in.
If the user is not authenticated, the mutation does not call the backend and instead shows a toast: 'Please log in to save settings'.
If the backend returns an Unauthorized error despite authentication, the existing descriptive error toast 'Access denied — please ensure you are logged in as an admin' is displayed.
On a successful save, a success toast is displayed.

file_operations.description: Modify the useUpdateSiteSettings mutation hook to verify the actor is authenticated before calling updateSiteSettings. Add an early guard that checks if the identity is present on the actor. If not authenticated, reject the mutation with a 'Please log in to save settings' error before making the backend call. Preserve the existing error handling for backend Unauthorized responses.

Update the handleSave function to handle the new authentication guard error from the useUpdateSiteSettings mutation. When the mutation rejects due to missing authentication, display a toast with the message 'Please log in to save settings'. Preserve the existing error toast for backend authorization failures ('Access denied — please ensure you are logged in as an admin'). Ensure the success toast is displayed on successful saves.
